MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):

W. Chris Maloney, Esq. 415-433-0990 Wilson Elser Moskowitz Edelman & Dicker LLP for Defendant Uber.
Andria Jaramillo, Esq. 510-540-4881 for Defendant Madhav Rana
Court reporter: Sheila Pham, CSR #13293, 415-274-9977, calendar-la@veritext.com, Reported.

ARGUED. Counsel for Defendant, Mr. Maloney contests and argues. Mr. Stanley responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay Action. (Amended)

Uber Technologies, Inc Motion to Compel Arbitration and to stay the action, is Taken Under Submission.

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)
